arts.ttl: Barcelona monitor Bayern Munich star for remainder of 2024-25 season
arts.sum: Barcelona are gearing up for a busy summer. Now that they are back within La Liga’s 1:1 rule, they will find it easier to sign players, and the intention is to add a few players to Hansi Flick’s squad before the start of the 2025-26 season, which kicks off in August. arts.ttl: Tottenham and Arsenal tussle to sign Barcelona player possible in summer
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur and Arsenal looked at Barcelona’s Ferran Torres in the winter market, according to a report from Spain. On December 28th, Sport reported Arsenal showed willingness to make an offer for the 24-year-old. However, there wasn’t anything concrete to suggest the Gunners submitting a bid for him.
